files.00_Overview.md: The most complete file - well-structured with 3W Framework, learning objectives, analogies, mermaid diagrams, and comprehensive context. Minor: Remove broken image link on line 187 (![[performance_vs_accuracy_tradeoff.png]]), fix inconsistent section 4 link format (links to 01_Introduction.md, 02_QA_Concepts.md which don't exist - should link to actual files 01_Performance_Profiling.md, 02_Regression_Testing.md)
files.01_Performance_Profiling.md: Strong technical content with good 3W application (Why profiling matters, What metrics, How to use tools). Has Learning Objectives in concept checks. Missing: dedicated Learning Objectives section at top, Key Takeaways summary. Add practical exercise section.
files.02_Regression_Testing.md: Severely underdeveloped - only 168 lines vs 340+ in file 01. Missing: Learning Objectives, Key Takeaways, Thai translations, detailed 3W Framework sections (What is regression testing, Why it matters, How to implement), OpenFOAM Context callouts, mermaid diagrams, examples of Reference Database management, detailed CI/CD patterns. Expand to match depth and style of 01_Performance_Profiling.md.
files.03_Debugging_Troubleshooting.md: Underdeveloped - only 150 lines. Missing: Learning Objectives, Key Takeaways, Thai translations, detailed 3W Framework, deeper coverage of GDB/Valgrind usage, DebugSwitches examples, pre-test checklist, more troubleshooting scenarios. The image placeholder comment (lines 35-39) references IMG_08_005.jpg but file reference on line 40 may be broken. Expand to match depth and bilingual style of 01_Performance_Profiling.md.

global_strategy: This folder has extreme quality inconsistency - file 01 is comprehensive (340+ lines, bilingual, well-structured) while files 02 and 03 are sparse outlines (150-168 lines, English-only). Strategy: (1) Expand 02_Regression_Testing.md to full depth with Thai/English bilingual content, Learning Objectives, Key Takeaways, OpenFOAM Context boxes, detailed CI/CD examples, Reference Database patterns, tolerance strategies, test hierarchies (Unit/Integration/System/Benchmark) with concrete OpenFOAM examples. (2) Expand 03_Debugging_Troubleshooting.md to full depth matching file 01's style with bilingual content, DebugSwitches examples, GDB/Valgrind detailed workflows, troubleshooting decision trees, pre-test checklists. (3) Fix broken image reference in 00_Overview.md line 187. (4) Standardize section link format across all files. (5) Add Key Takeaways sections to files 01-03. (6) Ensure all files follow 3W Framework (What/Why/How) with Learning Objectives at top and Concept Checks at bottom.
